title: She is here, I am her, we celebrate
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for collapsing the distance between who you are now and the wealthy version of you.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 28 of the MONEY program. Use to mark the moment when the gap between current self and wealthy self is no longer a gap, and to celebrate that arrival.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A three-minute energy statement practice from Day 28 of the MONEY program. The statement closes the Week 4 identity arc: she is no longer a future version to aspire toward, she is here. Say it as a plain declarative, not a wish.
I am ready to release all remaining separation between who I am now and the wealthy version of me. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the knowing that she is here, I am her, and we celebrate. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
